identity.philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Tension creates Interest.
identity.mission: Transform FaceConnect from a generic cyberpunk app into a high-fidelity biometric social instrument.

theme_strategy.description: A refined dark mode that uses deep obsidian backgrounds to make neon data points pop. Think 'high-end security interface meets underground rave'.

usage_rules.headings: Use 'Unbounded' for H1-H3. Tracking tight (-0.02em). Weight: 600 or 800.
usage_rules.body: Use 'Manrope' for all UI text. readable, geometric. Weight: 400 or 500.
usage_rules.captions: Uppercase, wide tracking (0.1em), low contrast color.

general.spacing: Generous. Use p-6 or p-8 where others use p-4.

navigation.style: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border border-white/10 rounded-full h-16 flex items-center justify-around z-50 shadow-2xl

reels.container_class: h-[100dvh] w-full overflow-y-scroll snap-y snap-mandatory scrollbar-hide

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-lg hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,229,255,0.4)] transition-all

cards.default: bg-card/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/5 rounded-2xl hover:border-primary/30 transition-colors duration-300

inputs.style: bg-white/5 border-b border-white/20 rounded-t-lg px-4 py-3 focus:border-primary focus:bg-white/10 transition-all outline-none placeholder:text-white/20

face_scanner.wrapper: relative w-full aspect-[3/4] rounded-3xl overflow-hidden border border-white/10
face_scanner.scan_line: absolute top-0 left-0 right-0 h-[2px] bg-primary shadow-[0_0_15px_#00E5FF] animate-scan

texture.noise: Use a subtle SVG noise overlay with mix-blend-mode: overlay opacity-20 to kill flat colors.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. UPDATE THEME: Replace cyan/purple basics in 'index.css' with the new palette (Obsidian/Electric Cyan). Import 'Unbounded' and 'Manrope'.
2. REFACTOR LAYOUT: Mobile-first. Remove standard top nav bars where possible; move to bottom glass dock.
3. FACE SCANNER: Use framer-motion for the scan line instead of raw CSS animations. Make the overlay feel like a HUD (heads-up display).
4. BENTO GRID: Implement a true masonry or bento layout for the 'Home' feed. Mix image sizes (aspect-square, aspect-video, aspect-[3/4]).
5. DATA-TESTID: Ensure every interactive element has a 'data-testid' (e.g., 'scan-face-btn', 'nav-home', 'post-like-btn').
6. USE SHADCN: Customize Shadcn components (Dialog, Drawer, Button) to match the 'Neo-Noir' aesthetic (remove heavy white backgrounds, add borders).
7. DO NOT ASK user for clarifications. Make decisions based on this document.

universal_guidelines.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.
universal_guidelines.accessibility: Ensure contrast ratios. Use aria-labels on icon-only buttons.
universal_guidelines.code_style: Functional components. Custom hooks for logic. Tailwind for styling.
